name: schuler-service-group.de
message: Schuler Service Group is a comprehensive service provider specializing in garden and landscape construction, with expertise dating back to 1956. They offer year-round green maintenance services in urban and industrial areas, catering to clients in the real estate sector, municipalities, and the chemical industry. The company emphasizes the importance of green infrastructure for enhancing quality of life and environmental support. With a dedicated team of 270 employees, they operate across Germany, maintaining a strong regional presence through multiple branches. Employees: 285  Revenue: $15.7 Million Industry: Business Services Phone Number:+49 613699000
